title: Big and Small, Tall and Short
lrc:
[00:00.00]Big! (held high) and small (low and quick),
[00:03.50]Tall (held high) and short (low and quick).
[00:07.00]Big like a horse, small like a mouse,
[00:10.50]Tall like a tree, short like a house.
[00:14.00]Big and small, tall and short,
[00:17.50]Every size is just the right sort!
[00:21.00]Big! Small! Tall! Short!
[00:24.00]Sing it loud — we love them all!
